text.message: Oh my, I am playing with platinum/diamond players already hahaha
First game after coming back after months
I left the game but ended up coming back, it’s too good haha
Maybe it is the same for you
Ohhh all the best to you
You can definitely do it if you keep  playing and improvinh
I just felt like changing it up
But I think you picked great, awesome ports you will have, so that was a good decision
Thing about ports is lower level players tend to over value them
I mean he did open up the board so idm
More options for you and me haha
blue u should always block ur dev comp
bro just decided he wants me to lose lol
I needed the wood there sorry
LOL what the f is this game
you all conspired for me to get fukd hahaha
triple plow on settles, 2 block 1 steal
if u wanna stop oj from deving
Red has city too now wow
I think its obvious red tho, but I’ll do ya a favor
i didnt expect red to stream roll us hahahaha
ill try extend but I need to city 8 5 10
Red has so much space haha
if oj doesn't build up to the 5 2
We have to keep hitting red then
His placements were actually genius wow haha
With so much space, his roads were good
as long as we keep robbing him
my guess is he's on 10 this turn if he doesn't 7
no other reason to decline trade
if he has 2 vps it's gg
ye but if he doesn't win
no I know I'm the steal
that's why I rob u red
I mean it makes sense, no one blocked him entire game
I only have sheep in hand
that setup is too good not to win without blocks
bro just got given a free win :D
from the start, from that 9 grain block you didn't do
